title: Assistant Store Manager - Titan Company - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Titan Company - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company:
Titan Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company!
